docs: Constructor
constructors.label: new

docs: Constructor with sample data and custom config
constructors.label: new_with_config

docs: Event emitted when ownership transfer is cancelled
events.label: OwnershipTransferCancelled

docs: USD price in scaled format (e.g., 6.50 USD = 6_500_000_000 with 9 decimals)
args.label: usd_price

docs: Timestamp of the update
args.label: timestamp

docs: Account that updated the price
args.label: updated_by

docs: Update DOT price in USD (for registry tier calculations)
messages.label: update_dot_usd_price

docs: Get DOT/USD price with staleness protection.
Returns the price only if it's not stale, otherwise returns StalePrice error.
messages.label: get_fresh_dot_usd_price

docs: Get current DOT price in USD
messages.label: get_dot_usd_price

docs: Check if DOT price data is stale
messages.label: is_dot_price_stale

docs: Get DOT price last update timestamp
messages.label: get_dot_price_last_update

docs: Emergency DOT price override (owner only)
Note: This function intentionally bypasses the pause state check to allow
the owner to correct prices during emergencies even when the contract is paused.
messages.label: emergency_dot_price_override

docs: Check if given token is the DOT price token
messages.label: is_dot_token

docs: Get the DOT token address used for USD price feeds
messages.label: get_dot_token_address

docs: Update complete token data with validation
messages.label: update_token_data

docs: Get complete token data
messages.label: get_token_data

docs: Get complete token data with staleness protection.
Returns the data only if the price is not stale, otherwise returns StalePrice error.
messages.label: get_fresh_token_data

docs: Get only price (backward compatibility)
messages.label: get_price

docs: Get market cap (backward compatibility)
messages.label: get_market_cap

docs: Get market volume (backward compatibility)
messages.label: get_market_volume

docs: Check if price data is stale
messages.label: is_price_stale

docs: Get price with staleness protection.
Returns the price only if it's not stale, otherwise returns StalePrice error.
messages.label: get_fresh_price

docs: Get last update timestamp
messages.label: get_last_update_time

docs: Add authorized updater (owner only)
messages.label: add_updater

docs: Remove authorized updater (owner only)
messages.label: remove_updater

docs: Check if account is authorized to update prices
messages.label: is_authorized_updater

docs: Get the dummy token address used for sample data
messages.label: get_dummy_token_address

docs: Update complete validation configuration (owner only).
Enforces maximum bounds on staleness_threshold and min_update_interval.
messages.label: set_validation_config

docs: Set maximum price deviation in basis points (owner only)
Example: 2000 = 20% max change, 500 = 5% max change
messages.label: set_max_deviation

docs: Set staleness threshold in seconds (owner only).
Example: 3600 = 1 hour, 1800 = 30 minutes, 7200 = 2 hours.
Maximum is 7 days (604800 seconds).
messages.label: set_staleness_threshold

docs: Set minimum update interval in seconds (owner only).
Example: 60 = 1 minute, 300 = 5 minutes, 30 = 30 seconds.
Maximum is 1 hour (3600 seconds).
messages.label: set_min_update_interval

docs: Get current validation configuration
messages.label: get_validation_config

docs: Get current maximum deviation in basis points
messages.label: get_max_deviation

docs: Get current staleness threshold in seconds
messages.label: get_staleness_threshold

docs: Get current minimum update interval in seconds
messages.label: get_min_update_interval

docs: Set contracts used for W3PI index-deviation validation.
messages.label: set_index_validation_contracts

docs: Enable or disable W3PI index-deviation validation.
messages.label: set_index_deviation_check_enabled

docs: Set maximum W3PI index deviation in basis points.
messages.label: set_max_index_deviation

docs: Get contracts used for W3PI index-deviation validation.
messages.label: get_index_validation_contracts

docs: Check whether W3PI index-deviation validation is enabled.
messages.label: is_index_deviation_check_enabled

docs: Get maximum W3PI index deviation in basis points.
messages.label: get_max_index_deviation

docs: Pause all price updates (owner only)
messages.label: pause_updates

docs: Resume price updates (owner only)
messages.label: resume_updates

docs: Emergency price override (owner only)
Note: This function intentionally bypasses the pause state check to allow
the owner to correct prices during emergencies even when the contract is paused.
messages.label: emergency_price_override

docs: Check if updates are paused
messages.label: is_paused

docs: Legacy update price method
messages.label: update_price

docs: Legacy update market data method.
Only updates market_data_timestamp, NOT the price timestamp,
preventing market data updates from resetting the price staleness timer.
messages.label: update_market_data

docs: Update token data with validation
messages.label: set_token_data

docs: Get the owner
messages.label: get_owner

docs: Propose ownership transfer to a new owner (owner only).
The new owner must call accept_ownership() to complete the transfer.
Validates that proposed owner is not the zero address.
messages.label: propose_ownership_transfer

docs: Accept pending ownership transfer (pending_owner only)
messages.label: accept_ownership

docs: Get the pending owner (if any)
messages.label: get_pending_owner

docs: Cancel pending ownership transfer (owner only)
messages.label: cancel_ownership_transfer
